name: _Diag_PreSend
title: _Diag_PreSend
description: Is called before a frame is transmitted. Allows manipulating the frame.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: Transmitted data buffer of the frame.

parameters.name: dataLenInOut
parameters.description: Indicates the length of the frame when _Diag_PreSend is called. Determines the length of the frame before the frame is transmitted.

parameters.name: headerLen
parameters.description: Length of the header of a frame. Not supported yet

availability: K-Line Real bus mode Online mode ECU tester
K-Line Real bus mode Online mode ECU simulation ECU tester
